Settings.title: Profile & Settings
Settings.subtitle: Your data is encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.
Settings.personalInfoDesc: This information is used for eligibility checks. It is never exposed in plaintext.
Settings.profileSavedDesc: Your data is encrypted and stored securely.

Marketing.heroSubtitle: Stop reading 20-page requirement PDFs. FormMitra acts as your personal AI copilot to instantly check your eligibility, track your documents, and build your application checklist.
Marketing.ctaSubtitle: Create your secure profile today and let the AI handle the research and preparation.
Marketing.step1Desc: Securely upload your IDs, certificates, and resumes to your encrypted vault.
Marketing.step2Desc: Paste a link or upload a PDF of the scholarship, internship, or scheme.
Marketing.step3Desc: The AI reasons through the requirements and tells you exactly where you stand.
Marketing.step4Desc: Follow the prioritized checklist to close gaps and submit your application.
Marketing.feature1Desc: Securely store your Aadhaar, PAN, resumes, and marksheets locally encrypted. Upload once, reuse everywhere.
Marketing.feature2Desc: Never guess if you qualify. Our AI cross-references your profile against strict application requirements to give you a definitive Yes/No.
Marketing.feature3Desc: Turn complex applications into a prioritized, step-by-step checklist. We flag missing documents and highlight critical deadlines.
Marketing.feature4Desc: Have a PDF? Upload it. Have a website link? Paste it. FormMitra's crawler extracts the exact requirements you need from any source.
